bioShort: Multidisciplinary UX/UI designer (B.Des., Bezalel) and product strategist with an M.A. in Psychodrama. I combine human psychology with functional design to build intuitive digital experiences.

projects.title: Sababa & All
projects.meta: Web app · UX/UI lead · Claude Code
projects.desc: Transformed manual matchmaking into a streamlined digital workflow — better organisation, privacy-first, and actually adopted by the team.

projects.title: ShiftWise
projects.desc: AI-assisted shift scheduling for therapeutic and residential care teams — availability, swaps and fairness management, minus the spreadsheet headache.

projects.title: Balance
projects.desc: Medication management for a Jerusalem 'Soteria' house. Medication errors dropped from 5% to 0% — faster and safer for all three user personas.

projects.title: BibleConnect
projects.desc: An interactive Bible learning app — study, exploration and AI-powered conversation that makes an ancient text personal and accessible.

projectSlots.note: open slot — drop your next case study here

bioLong: I lead social-tech ventures and non-profits, leveraging AI-driven tools, user advocacy and empathetic problem-solving. My favourite work sits where people are most human: care teams, communities, learning.
aboutQuote: → design is empathy with a grid system.
